/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libarm_interface__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libarm_interface__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/arm_interface__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/arm_interface/srv/detail/arm_kinemarics__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/arm_interface__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/arm_interface/msg/detail/arm_joint__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/arm_interface__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/arm_interface/msg/detail/april_tag_info__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/arm_interface__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/arm_interface/msg/detail/center_xy__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/arm_interface__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/arm_interface/msg/detail/shape_info__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/arm_interface__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/arm_interface/msg/detail/yolov5_detect__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/arm_interface__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/arm_interface/msg/detail/position__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/arm_interface__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/arm_interface/msg/detail/cur_joints__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/arm_interface__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/arm_interface/msg/detail/target_xy_roll__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
